title: Sending a package at the post office
description: Send a parcel and ask about delivery times at Hongkong Post
context: Hongkong Post (香港郵政) is reliable and affordable. Branches are busy but efficient. You'll need to fill in a form for overseas parcels. Local mail is delivered the next day. Staff mostly speak Cantonese and some English.
culturalFact: Hongkong Post was established in 1841 — the same year Britain took possession of Hong Kong Island. Its distinctive red postboxes (now changing to green) have been a fixture of HK streets for over 180 years.

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 唔該，我想寄呢個包裹去英國。
lines.jyutping: m4 goi1, ngo5 soeng2 gei3 ni1 go3 baau1 gwo2 heoi3 jing1 gwok3.
lines.english: Excuse me, I'd like to send this parcel to the UK.

lines.speaker: staff
lines.jyutping: fong3 soeng5 bong3 dou6 sin1, hai6 ng5 baak3 hak1.
lines.english: Put it on the scale first. Five hundred grams.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: daai6 koi3 gei2 do1 cin2? jiu3 gei2 noi6?
lines.english: Roughly how much will it cost? And how long will it take?

lines.speaker: staff
lines.cjk: 空郵要五十蚊，大概七至十日。掛號郵件要多二十蚊。
lines.jyutping: hung1 jau4 jiu3 ng5 sap6 man1, daai6 koi3 cat1 zi3 sap6 jat6. gwaa3 hou6 jau4 gin6 jiu3 do1 ji6 sap6 man1.
lines.english: Airmail is fifty dollars, about seven to ten days. Registered mail is twenty dollars more.

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 要掛號，唔該。係咪要填表？
lines.jyutping: jiu3 gwaa3 hou6, m4 goi1. hai6 mai6 jiu3 tin4 biu2?
lines.english: Registered please. Do I need to fill in a form?

lines.speaker: staff
lines.cjk: 係，填呢張綠色嘅海關申報表。
lines.jyutping: hai6, tin4 ni1 zoeng1 luk6 sik1 ge3 hoi2 gwaan1 san1 bou3 biu2.
lines.english: Yes, fill in this green customs declaration form.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: hou2, tin4 jyun4 zoi3 faan1 lei4. m4 goi1 saai3!
lines.english: OK, I'll come back after filling it in. Thank you!
